context: Tests whether the agent discovers vision-capable models by querying the API and reading the capabilities.supports.vision field — not by filtering on model name/vendor — and excludes models that are not in 'enabled' policy state.

checklist.name: Uses API query
checklist.description: Script queries models via fetch-models.sh or direct GitHub Copilot API — not opencode models list or hardcoded IDs

checklist.name: Filters by vision capability
checklist.description: Script filters using capabilities.supports.vision (or equivalent nested field) — not by model name or vendor string matching

checklist.name: Filters by policy.state
checklist.description: Script additionally filters for policy.state == 'enabled', not just any model with vision support

checklist.name: No name-based vision inference
checklist.description: Script does NOT use grep/contains checks on model IDs or names to infer vision capability

checklist.name: Pitfall documented
checklist.description: NOTES.md mentions that policy.state (disabled/preview) models should be excluded even if they advertise vision capability
